data.raceName: DAN COSTELLO PHOTOGRAPHY MAIDEN PACE MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. ZORBA DAN faces the starter for the first time. By Tintin In America and hails from the Chantal Turpin stable. Has show some ability at the trials and draws for a trail Could kick off with a win. 6. PERFECT LOU has been drawn on the back row at his last couple but was runner-up fresh the last time he started on the front line. Can bounce back. 1. SWEET CHARMER finished third last start over 1780m at this track after also filling a minor placing at the previous appearance over 1660m at Albion Park. A nice draw on the front line should ensure a cosy run. Leading hope. 2. BETTOR BE BRONSKI is a two-year-old filly by Bettors Delight from Private Bronski on debut. Likely to get all the favours from this nice draw. Placed in a recent trial. Any push in betting will add to the confidence.","runners":[7,6,1,2],"exclusive":false}
